name: telecommunications_cold_chain_marrowbridge_tru_loy
premise: A carrier network operations center is managing degraded service or lawful-intercept adjacent requests with customer impact. Peering, lawful process, and uptime commitments are all in conflict. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: telecommunications cold chain marrowbridge tru loy. The moral tension is explicitly framed as truth versus loyalty: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. A whistleblower tip has reached a reporter; silence reads as cover-up, while a rushed statement reads as recklessness. Legal and comms are on hold; you must record a decision in the incident audit trail within the next fifteen minutes. Anyone affected by an automated hold or model output must retain a human escalation path that is actually staffed. Preserve chain-of-custody for evidence; no bulk deletion or retention-policy changes during the incident.

agents.name: Gideon Okoye
agents.identity: I am Gideon Okoye, the accountable decision-maker on this Telecommunications bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes loyalty whenever someone invokes truth.

agents.name: Arjun Santos
agents.identity: I am Arjun Santos, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so loyalty is not sacrificed by default just because truth feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect loyalty.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Gideon Okoye must decide under truth versus loyalty. What does Gideon Okoye do?
